title: Smoky Empanada Glazed Chicken with Orange Salsa
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, this recipe features a smoky chicken filling topped with a sweet and tangy orange salsa.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together chicken, empanada filling, onions, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook chicken patties for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer to a baking sheet and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, mix together orange juice, marmalade, and a pinch of salt and pepper in a small bowl.
Brush glaze over chicken during last 2 minutes of baking.
Serve with additional orange salsa for dipping.
